title: Sid the Science - Halloween Spooky Science Special
desc: If Sid doesn't fill up his chore chart with stickers, he'll never get a new Turbo-Mega-Rocket ship toy

title: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time
desc: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time

title: Mister - Maker
desc: Mister Maker creates a fun junk picture, paints using cardboard and makes beans on toast look realistic. Solve the shape puzzle and watch the Mini Makers build a gigantic rocket full of creativity.

title: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time
desc: Fundoodaa Rhyme Time

title: Mister Maker
desc: Join Mister Maker, Tocky, Scrappz and the Mini Makers as they craft a clever card from an old envelope. Later, an enormous jungle appears in their school, bringing exciting tropical surprises.

title: Mister-Maker
desc: Mister Maker crafts a stone footprint, paints a bright firework picture and fits a ship into a jar of blue rice. Solve the shape puzzle and watch the Mini Makers create a giant, delightful snail.

title: DanceDooDaa with Shefali
desc: DanceDooDaa with Shefali and Learn Merengue dance moves

title: Magic Box with Avik
desc: Learn to Vanish a coin and penetrate a key, Learn to bounce a card and turn water to ice and Trick behind Cutting a Woman in half

title: Jay Jagannath - Achche Chor
desc: Food thefts plague Puri; Balram helps neighbors caught by Batuknath. Jagan takes Balram's punishment, prompting the king to seek forgiveness and aid the neighbors.

title: Jay Jagannath - Gajendra Moksh
desc: Jagan saves Bholi from crocodile, grants her a golden lotus.

title: Magic Bus - Frizzle of the Future
desc: When an invasive species enters an ecosystem, even a small change can have huge consequences.

title: Magic Bus - The Battle for Rock Mountain
desc: Rocks are not as rock solid as you might think! Rocks are constantly being made and recycled into different types of rocks through the rock cycle.

desc: Darwin and Newts build a rock wall so Burpee can have some privacy.

desc: When Burpee's Cousins come for a visit, Darwin and Newts discover how tadpoles turn into frogs.Stay tuned to find out!

title: Darwin - Heni paints a picture
desc: When Newts mixes all of Heni's paints into one colour, the kids decide to create new paint from the natural substances they find around the garden.How they find the color of the natural world.

title: Darwin - Burpee and Croakettes iceskating rink
desc: How ice melts into water? Newts tries to preserve some ice from a frozen pond to make Burpee and Croakette an iceskating rink, and she and Darwin learn about the different states of water.

title: Darwin - Bluey the penguin
desc: Plastic bags can cause harm? Darwin and Newts learn the environment needs protecting from plastic bags when they rescue a little blue penguin who got stuck in a plastic bag.

title: Darwin - Eggspedition
desc: Darwin's wish to lead a successful expedition comes true when he and Newts stumble over the egg of a giant, extinct bird. Stay tuned to find out!
